info.name: Character Image Generation API
info.description:
API for generating character images using ComfyUI and xAI Grok-4.

Base URL: http://localhost:8001

**Quick Start:**
1. Run 'Get Debug Token' first to authenticate
2. Use any 'Create Character' request to generate images
3. Run 'Get Job Status' - image displays automatically when ready!

**New Features:**
- Images display directly in Postman response (Visualize tab)
- Preview URLs auto-saved for easy access
- 'View Last Image' request for quick re-viewing

request.description: Check API health status, queue size, and version. No authentication required.

exec: console.log('✅ Token saved to collection variable');

request.description: Get a test JWT token (DEBUG MODE ONLY). The token is automatically saved to collection variables.

exec: console.log('✅ Token saved for user:', jsonData.user_id);

query.description: Custom user ID for the token

request.description: Get a test JWT token with a custom user ID.
Check if ComfyUI server is running and accessible.
Get storage statistics and disk usage information (DEBUG MODE ONLY).

exec: console.log('👉 Next: Run "Get Job Status" and check the Visualize tab to see the image!');

request.description: Character with specific seed for reproducible results (1-1,000,000,000).
Anime-style character generation.

exec: console.log('✅ Job created with all options');

body.raw:
{
  "id": "my-custom-request-id",
  "persona": {
    "style": "realistic",
    "ethnicity": "caucasian",
    "age": 32,
    "hairStyle": "curly",
    "hairColor": "redhead",
    "eyeColor": "green",
    "bodyType": "curvy",
    "breastSize": "large",
    "name": "Victoria",
    "personality": "dominant",
    "relationship": "boss",
    "occupation": "boss_ceo",
    "kinks": ["control", "dirty_talk", "roleplay"],
    "voice": "sultry"
  },
  "context": "Executive office with city view at sunset",
  "output": {
    "aspectRatio": "2:3",
    "resolution": "944x1408",
    "seed": 42,
    "n": 1
  },
  "providerHints": {
    "model": "flux",
    "provider": "comfyui"
  }
}

request.description: Character generation with all available options including custom ID, personality, relationship, occupation, kinks, voice, output settings, and provider hints.
Generate multiple images (1-4) in a single request.
Generate character without xAI Grok prompt enhancement (uses raw prompt).

exec: // When job succeeds, save preview URLs and show visualizer
// Save first preview URL for quick access
console.log('👉 Click the "Visualize" tab below to see the image(s)!');
.container { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; padding: 20px; }
.status { background: #10b981; color: white; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.image-card img { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
.prompt { margin-top: 12px; padding: 12px; background: #e5e7eb; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; max-height: 150px; overflow-y: auto; }
❌ Job Failed
<div style='margin-top: 20px; padding: 16px; background: #fef2f2; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #fecaca;'>
console.log('⏳ Job still processing. Run this request again to check status.');
{{status}}
Run this request again to refresh status

request.description:
Poll job status with automatic image preview!

**When job succeeds:**
- Click the 'Visualize' tab to see the image(s) directly
- Preview URL is saved to {{last_preview_url}}
- Click 'Open in new tab' to view full size

**Status progression:** queued → running → succeeded/failed
Replace 'imgjob_xxxxx' with actual job ID.
Cancel a queued job. Only works for jobs in 'queued' status. Returns 204 No Content on success.

exec: console.log('👉 Check the response body or Visualize tab to see the image.');
✅ Image Loaded
<div style='background: #f3f4f6; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: inline-block;'>
console.log('❌ Failed to load image. Status:', pm.response.code);
console.log('❌ No preview URL saved. Generate an image first!');
throw new Error('No preview URL available. Run a generate request first.');

request.description:
Quickly view the last generated image without copying URLs!

This uses the automatically saved {{last_preview_url}} from the job status.

**Prerequisites:**
1. Generate an image
2. Run 'Get Job Status' until succeeded
3. Run this request to view the image

Paste a full preview URL here to view any image.

Replace the URL with the previewUrl from job status response.
Check if the last preview image still exists and token is valid (without downloading).

exec: .status { background: #10b981; color: white; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.image-card { background: #f3f4f6; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: inline-block; }
Open in new tab ↗

request.description:
Edit an image using ComfyUI workflow. Select an image file to upload.

Supported formats: PNG, JPEG, JPG, WebP

Returns synchronously with edited image preview URL.

**After running:** Check the Visualize tab to see the result!

exec: console.log('✅ Edit complete! Check Visualize tab.');

request.description: Change pose to standing front. Replace source_image with an actual Supabase image URL.

Change pose to lying back.
Change pose to all fours.
Test 401 Unauthorized response when JWT token is missing.
Test 422 Validation Error when required persona fields are missing.
Test 422 Validation Error when age is out of range (must be 18-99).
Test 422 Validation Error when more than 3 kinks are provided.
Test 404 Not Found when job ID doesn't exist.
Test 422 Validation Error when seed is out of range (must be 1-1,000,000,000).
